notes: Had to disable the steam overlay or else the game would freeze completely whenever there was a achievement pop-up. The game is also hard-coded to 1280x720 resolution and cannot go full-screen, so I had to change the X resolution to match instead.
title: Alternate Jake Hunter: DAEDALUS The Awakening of Golden Jazz / ダイダロス：ジ・アウェイクニング・オブ・ゴールデンジャズ / Prequel Story of Detective Saburo Jinguji Daedalus: The Awakening of Golden Jazz
